public_reputation: Known around Mimolot Academy through day-to-day work as shrine attendant.
appearance: Velis Quillfire usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their shrine attendant status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Protects small rituals with quiet firmness and notices subtle breaches long before they become public offense. In Mimolot Academy, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of shrine attendant in and around Mimolot Academy, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Mimolot Academy workable through the obligations of shrine attendant while managing the immediate pressure of tariff tensions.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of shrine attendant credible while absorbing the strain created by tariff tensions.

adventure_hooks.summary: Velis Quillfire can draw the party into a locality problem centered on shrine attendant duties in Mimolot Academy.
Velis Quillfire becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with tariff tensions around Mimolot Academy.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Velis Quillfire is immediately readable as a shrine attendant tied to Mimolot Academy.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Mimolot Academy: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Velis Quillfire presents as someone shaped by the duties of a shrine attendant and the daily pressures of Mimolot Academy.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a shrine attendant, and proof that strangers will not make Mimolot Academy harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Velis Quillfire refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a shrine attendant too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can identify offerings, taboos, and recent signs of ritual irregularity.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Velis Quillfire adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Velis Quillfire always knows more about Mimolot Academy than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a shrine attendant in Mimolot Academy.
